issues.title: [V7 review] Systematic debugging for AI agents: Introducing the AgentRx framework
issues.body:
Title: Systematic debugging for AI agents: Introducing the AgentRx framework
URL: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/blog/systematic-debugging-for-ai-agents-introducing-the-agentrx-framework/
Domain: ai-llm-agent
Score: 3.3
Risk level: low
Lifecycle: new
Confidence: high

Core insight:
The evolution of AI agents into critical operational tools has created a fundamental reliability gap, where their growing power is undermined by the inability to diagnose failures, making systematic debugging frameworks like AgentRx not just a technical improvement but a prerequisite for safe and scalable agent deployment.

Primary contradiction:
The increasing autonomy and complexity of AI agents vs. the lack of systematic transparency and debuggability for their failures.

Enrichment summary:
-

Support evidence:
- None
